mapper.insert: insert into article_tags(article_tags_id, name, slug,create_time,is_deleted) values (#{articleTagsId}, #{name}, #{slug},now(),0)
mapper.update: update article_tags set name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, update_time = now() where article_tags_id = #{articleTagsId} and is_deleted = 0

update article_tags set usage_frequency = usage_frequency + 1 where article_tags_id in
#{item.tagId}
mapper.delete: delete from article_tag_relations where article_id = #{articleId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select article_tags_id, name, slug, usage_frequency from article_tags where is_deleted = 0
select article_tags_id, name, slug from article_tags where is_deleted = 0 and article_tags_id = #{articleTagsId}
select article_tag_relations_id, article_id, article_tags_id as tagId, name, slug from article_tag_relations where is_deleted = 0 and article_id = #{articlesId}
select usage_frequency from article_tags where is_deleted = 0 and article_tags_id = #{tagId}
select article_tags_id as tagId from article_tag_relations where is_deleted = 0 and article_id = #{articlesId}

select article_tags_id as tagId from article_tag_relations where is_deleted = 0 and article_id in
#{item}

select article_tags_id as tagId,name from article_tag_relations where is_deleted = 0 and article_tags_id in
#{item}
select article_tags_id, name, slug from article_tags

select articles_id, article_categories_id, category_name, title, slug, summary, cover_image, view_count, like_count, comment_count, word_count, reading_time, is_top, publish_time from articles where is_published = 1 and articles_id in (select article_id from article_tag_relations where is_deleted = 0 and article_tag_relations.slug = #{slug}) and is_deleted = 0
